name: Corridor Crew
oneLine: VFX studio's behind-the-scenes channel known for VFX Artists React.
bio: Corridor Crew is the second YouTube channel of Corridor Digital, the LA-based filmmaking studio founded by Sam Gorski and Niko Pueringer, who met as junior-high students in Stillwater, Minnesota. The channel posts behind-the-scenes content, stunt and animation experiments, and the popular VFX Artists React and Stuntmen React series, hosted by core team members including Wren Weichman, Clinton Jones, Jordan Harvey and Niko. As of late 2024 it has surpassed ten million subscribers.
style: Long-form reaction and behind-the-scenes videos with multiple hosts
notable: Is It A Good Idea To Microwave This (legacy)
